added: Plan registered with corrected single-Netlify-project model and assisted-manual capability pattern (caught during plan review)
remaining_work: platform/capabilities/site/promote.sh — dev→staging→main with date-based release tags
platform/capabilities/site/rollback.sh — revert to previous or named tag
Assisted-manual UI pattern (open vendor URL + poll for completion)
Apply to MBSH as first user

memory_candidates.title: Single Netlify project per site (not two) — branch deploys handle staging
memory_candidates.body: Decided against a separate <tag>-staging Netlify project. One Netlify project per site, with native branch deploys serving staging at <tag>--staging.netlify.app and the production branch (main) serving the custom domain. Simpler, matches Netlify native pattern.
